doc.holes: Tubes probe-measured; heights clamped to the tube aspect on the 16:9 canvas (probe bleeds ~1% into the dark panel).
doc.tv_wide: Removed: variant-level game aspect is not modeled, so the 16:9 tube would letterbox a 4:3 game against its own frame. Revisit with widescreen-aware variants.
doc.hole_correction: Painted tube measured 2.4px wider / 3px taller than the probed hole at bezel-priority scale (judge-measured 2026-07-07); nudged so the opening sits flush on the integer game.
